core_mechanism: time reversal of a stochastic (Markov) transition operator, constructing a dual reversed operator such that the ratio of a forward trajectory's probability to that of its conjugate reversed trajectory is fixed by an exchanged conserved quantity — a detailed-balance / fluctuation-theorem construction
brief_reason: The abstract builds a time reversal of a linear stochastic map that is 'closely analogous to the time reversal of a classical Markov transition matrix' and relates the probability of a trajectory to that of its time-reversed conjugate via the heat exchanged with the environment, which is exactly a detailed-balance/fluctuation-relation structure on a Markov transition operator.
